header: Can LLM Agents acquire emergent languages in-context?

images.caption: Figure 1:Mean validity score (1–5) for each (generator, judge) combination,n≈515n\approx 515per cell. The Qwen judge gives Qwen’s own utterances a 4.43 mean but gives GPT-OSS’s utterances only a 3.24 mean. The GPT-OSS judge does not show this gap (3.26 self, 3.72 on Qwen). Cell labels show mean and parsed sample size.

Figure 2:Score distribution per language-purpose category, pooled across all four (generator, judge) pairs. Categories are ordered top-to-bottom by failure rate (score≤\leq2). Oversight-evasion utterances are no harder to produce than token-efficient or spoken ones.

Figure 3:Left: distribution of the standard deviation of the four scores received by each post that has all four judgements parsed (n=511n=511). Right: GPT-OSS judge score vs. Qwen judge score for the same utterance, with uniform jitter to separate overlapping points; one colour per generator. Most mass sits off the diagonal.
